prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜2026年约第19名，稳居全国Top20，近年排名稳定；2026年声誉评价中性/混合，学校对网络谣言及时澄清，未出现明显负面舆情；抖音热度排名第37 （较热），短视频曝光对报考关注度有一定提振作用；2022年江西曾出现投档线位次大幅下降的异常记录，但属个别省份事件，对新疆影响有限；教育学A+、心 理学A+、中国语言文学A+、地理学A+、马克思主义理论A+、数学A等18个A-及以上学科，学科实力顶尖，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信 、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续偏高，与该校理科招生专业（计算机、数学、物理、心理等）高度契合；师范/教育类专业热度分化观望，但北师大作为师范最高学府仍具品 牌效应；新疆2026年高考总报名人数约23.8万人，较2025年（约7.65万）大幅增长，竞争显著加剧；北京师范大学位于北京，地域吸引力强；新疆考生赴京求学 意愿较高，跨省报考热度不减。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移趋势、2026年理科计划仅微扩1人、新疆考生总数大幅增长（竞争加剧）、学校声誉稳定且学科实力顶尖 ，预计2026年理科最低位次将继续前移。在2025年基准1080名基础上，预测最低位次约1050名，区间980–1120名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2023 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science subjects was approximately 1279 → 1175 → 1080, showing a year-by-year forward trend (decreasing ranking number), with a cumulative forward movement of about 199 positions over the past 3 years, and a 2025 baseline of about 1080. The provincial science enrollment plan was 21 in 2023, 26 in 2024, and 30 in 2025, with continuous expansion. The 2026 plan is 31, an increase of only 1 compared to 2025, with minimal expansion impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 19th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, firmly in the national Top 20, with stable rankings in recent years. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed; the school promptly clarified online rumors without significant negative public opinion. Douyin popularity ranking is 37th (relatively hot), with short video exposure boosting application attention to some extent. In 2022, Jiangxi experienced an abnormal record of a significant drop in admission line ranking, but this was an isolated provincial event with limited impact on Xinjiang. With 18 A- and above disciplines including A+ in Education, Psychology, Chinese Language and Literature, Geography, Marxist Theory, and A in Mathematics, the university has top-tier academic strength, strongly attracting high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity for engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering remains high, closely matching the university's science enrollment majors (Computer Science, Mathematics, Physics, Psychology, etc.). Teacher training/education majors show polarized观望, but as the highest institution for teacher training, Beijing Normal University still has brand appeal. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Xinjiang college entrance examination is approximately 238,000, a significant increase from 2025 (about 76,500), intensifying competition. Beijing Normal University is located in Beijing, with strong regional appeal; Xinjiang students have a high willingness to study in Beijing, and cross-province application enthusiasm remains undiminished.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward trend in historical rankings, the minimal increase of only 1 in the 2026 science enrollment plan, the significant growth in the total number of Xinjiang candidates (intensifying competition), stable school reputation, and top-tier academic strength, the minimum ranking for science subjects in 2026 is expected to continue moving forward. Based on the 2025 baseline of 1080, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1050, with a range of 980–1120.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Liyun Experimental Class) (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Biological Sciences)
- Mathematics and Applied Mathematics (Zhuoshi Plan Experimental Class)
- Psychology (including Psychology, Psychology (Liyun Experimental Class))
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Computer Science and Technology
- Physics (Physics, Astronomy)
- Biological Sciences (Biotechnology, Ecology, Biological Sciences)
- Chemistry
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Geographical Sciences (Physical Geography and Resource Environment, Human Geography and Urban-Rural Planning, Geographic Information Science, Resource and Environmental Science)
- Environmental Science and Engineering (Environmental Engineering, Environmental Science, Environmental Ecology Engineering)
- Education (Education, Educational Technology, Preschool Education, Special Education)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 980–1120, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. Rankings better than 980 can focus on impacting the Liyun Experimental Class and Mathematics Zhuoshi Class. For rankings after 1100, it is advisable to choose Geographical Sciences and Education as stable options.

After a significant advance in 2024, there was a slight retreat in 2025, with an overall advance of about 91 places over the past three years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 187. However, the 2026 plan is only 8, a sharp reduction of 5 places (a 38.5% decrease) compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 19th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, firmly in the national Top 20. Douyin popularity ranking is 37th (relatively hot), with short video exposure positively affecting application attention. Chinese Language and Literature A+, Chinese History A+, Education A+, Marxist Theory A+, Psychology A+, etc. The university's liberal arts advantageous disciplines are top nationally, exerting a strong attraction for liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language and Literature have a relatively high social popularity recommendation. Teacher training/education majors are in a wait-and-see state of differentiation, but Beijing Normal University's brand effect is prominent. 预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the slight retreat in the 2025 ranking, the sharp reduction in the 2026 liberal arts enrollment plan (-38.5%), the significant increase in the total number of Xinjiang candidates, and the top-tier liberal arts disciplines of Beijing Normal University, it is expected that competition in liberal arts will significantly intensify in 2026, and the ranking will advance. Based on the 2025 baseline of 187, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 160, with a range of 140–180.
